query: Could you devise a 5-day travel itinerary for a group of 2, departing from Detroit to explore 2 cities in Wisconsin from March 1st to March 5th, 2022? Our budget is set at $3,200. We require accommodations where parties are allowed and should preferably be entire rooms. Please note that we will not be using a self-driving car; suggest other transportation modes for us.

plan.transportation: taxi, from Detroit to La Crosse, duration: 8 hours 23 mins, distance: 915 km, cost: 915

plan.attraction: Children's Museum of La Crosse;Riverside Park;Grandad Bluff Park;
plan.accommodation: Great location-Newly updated-great new features, La Crosse

plan.transportation: taxi, from La Crosse to Appleton, duration: 3 hours 2 mins, distance: 273 km, cost: 273
plan.breakfast: The History Museum at the Castle, Appleton
plan.attraction: The History Museum at the Castle;Atlas Science Center Center;Gordon Bubolz Nature Preserve;
plan.accommodation: MODERN GARDEN 1BR IN NEWLY RENOVATED TOWNHOUSE, Appleton

plan.attraction: Butterfly Garden of Wisconsin;Patriot Park;Highview Park;
plan.accommodation: MODERN GARDEN 1BR IN NEWLY RENOVATED TOWNHOUSE, Appleton
